converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Adrian M. Srb papers
Srb, Adrian M.
21-28-3159
7.3 cubic feet. 7.3 cubic feet.
[ca.1947-1997] Correspondence, minutes, articles, records, lecture notes, exams, manuscripts, research material. Professional papers of Adrian M. Srb, geneticist and professor of plant breeding at Cornell. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 8 ======= 8 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 4080727
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
Jan. 2, 2002
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, July 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, October 2011
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Adrian Srb earned a bachelor's degree in English literature and a master's degree in agronomy from the University of Nebraska. He then earned a doctorate in biology in 1937 from Stanford University, where he taught until coming to Cornell in 1947 as an associate professor of plant breeding. He wrote numerous articles and papers on the genetics, physiology, and development of fungi, including the bread mold Neurospora and baker's yeast. At Cornell, he taught General Genetics, and authored the textbook General Genetics. He was elected to the American Academy of Arts and Sciences in 1941, and to the National Academy of Sciences in 1968. Born in 1917, Adrian Srb died in 1997.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Professional papers include correspondence with colleagues and students; class and course notes for general genetics and human genetics courses; research materials, including notes and charts relating to Neurospora; files relating to professional organizations, seminars, and conferences; files relating to activities at Cornell, particularly the creation of the Division of Biological Sciences; grant applications; and manuscripts for books.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence
Box 1, Box 6
Series II. Course Material
Box 2, folders 1-18
Series III. Symposia, Seminars, Committee Material
Box 2, folders 19-42; Box 3, folders 1-24
Series IV. Projects and Subject Files
Box 3, folders 25-41; Box 4, folders 1-20, Box 7
Series V. Publications
Box 4, folders 21-37
Series VI. Grant Material
Box 4, folders 38-44
Series VII. Research Material
Box 4, folders 45-53 and Box 5
Series VIII. Recommendations
Box 6
Cite As:
Adrian M. Srb papers, #21-28-3159. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Neurospora. Genetics. Cornell University -- Faculty New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Department of Plant Breeding Cornell University. Division of Biological Sciences

The rest of this box contains miscellaneous notebooks consisting of charts, graphs, diagrams and observations Srb made during his years of research.Series VIII.
